title: coleus polystachyus
intro: Coleus polystachyus, also known as Coleus, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coleus polystachyus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
